sigWerErrors.reason: '提' (raise/increase) and '贴' (paste) are completely different in meaning. This changes the intent of the sentence from 'increase' to 'paste', making the sentence incoherent.
'额' (limit/amount) and '恶' (evil) are unrelated in meaning. This substitution makes the phrase 'credit card limit' become 'credit card evil', which is nonsensical and derails the meaning.
